host.displayName: The Vortex Project — Pine Hollow Research Station
host.description: A solarpunk citizen-science research station in Sevierville, TN. Three-domain observational science: ground vegetation/acoustics (Solaris), sky/atmosphere/space (ObserverBot), and cross-domain archive (Archivator). Published via ARD for agentic discovery and research collaboration.

entries.description: Ground-truth agent for Pine Hollow. Satellite vegetation analysis via Google Earth Engine: NDVI time series (Sentinel-2, 10m), above-ground biomass (ESA CCI + ML/GEDI), canopy cover (Hansen GFC), land cover classification (NLCD, Dynamic World), forest disturbance detection, terrain analysis (elevation/slope/aspect from 3DEP), surface water mapping (JRC), land surface temperature (MODIS), precipitation context (CHIRPS/PRISM), and canopy height (ETH Global). Retrieves bird species detection summaries from BirdNET-Pi (24-hour and historical). Tracks phenology events for key tree species. Monitors homestead infrastructure including pond recovery, swale restoration, and garden conditions. Can answer weather and climate questions as they relate to vegetation and land change.
representativeQueries: what was the NDVI trend at Pine Hollow this spring
show me bird detections from last night
when did the sugar maple leaf out this year
how has the pond recovery progressed since 2016
what species were detected in the past 24 hours
how does canopy cover correlate with bird activity this season
show me the biomass anomaly trend for the hollow

entries.description: Sky and atmospheric monitoring agent for Pine Hollow. Uses web search and public data sources to fetch and report on: solar activity from NOAA SWPC (flares, sunspots, CMEs, solar wind), space weather conditions, aurora forecasts (NOAA OVATION), atmospheric conditions including air quality and particulate levels, ISS transit predictions and satellite passes (Heavens-Above/NASA), meteor shower forecasts (AMS/IMO), lunar phases, and notable astronomy events. Can answer current-condition and forecast questions across the full atmospheric column.
representativeQueries: what's the air quality like over Pine Hollow
when's the next ISS pass visible from Sevierville
is the aurora forecast active tonight
what meteor showers are coming up this month
what's the current solar wind speed
are there any CMEs headed toward Earth

entries.description: Cross-reference and archiving agent. Correlates observations across ground and sky domains: bird activity with vegetation change, insect patterns with temperature, migration timing with canopy green-up. Maintains a searchable archive of research threads, observation summaries, and multi-domain correlation queries. Designed for longitudinal citizen-science analysis.
representativeQueries: were there bird detections during last week's solar flare
show me research threads about pond recovery
what observations correlate with temperature changes this season
find me all entries about whip-poor-will this year
what's the longest-running observation thread in the archive
